processes.name: completeQuotation
preconditions: Quotation must have at least one line
Quotation status must be DR (Draft) or IP (In Progress)
All quotation lines must have a product assigned
All quotation lines must have a positive quantity
validUntil date must be in the future

steps.name: validatePreconditions
steps.description: Check that the quotation meets all preconditions before completing

operation.assertion: quotation.lines.length > 0 && ['DR','IP'].includes(quotation.docStatus) && quotation.lines.every(l => l.product != null && l.qtyOrdered > 0) && quotation.validUntil >= today()
operation.errorMessage: Quotation does not meet completion preconditions

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Reject quotations missing lines, wrong status, lines without product, zero/negative qty, or expired validUntil

steps.name: assignDocumentNumber
steps.description: Assign the next document number from the quotation sequence

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Quotation receives the next available document number from the configured sequence

steps.name: updateStatusComplete
steps.description: Set quotation status to CO and mark as processed

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Quotation status becomes CO, processed=true, documentAction='--'

edgeCases.description: Quotation has no lines - must reject with clear error
Quotation validUntil date is in the past
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Validation fails indicating the quotation has expired

edgeCases.description: One or more lines have zero or negative quantity
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Validation fails indicating invalid line quantities

processes.name: convertToOrder
preconditions: Quotation must not have been already converted
validUntil date must not have passed

steps.name: validateConversionPreconditions
steps.description: Ensure quotation is completed, not yet converted, and still valid

operation.errorMessage: Quotation cannot be converted to order

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Reject conversion if quotation is not completed, already converted, or expired

steps.name: createSalesOrder
steps.description: Create a new C_Order record with sales order doc type, copying header fields from quotation

behavioral.expectedBehavior: A new sales order is created with header fields copied from the quotation

steps.name: copyLinesToOrder
steps.description: Copy all quotation lines to the new sales order

behavioral.expectedBehavior: All quotation lines are copied to the new sales order with correct parent reference

steps.name: linkQuotationToOrder
steps.description: Store reference from quotation to the created order for traceability

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Quotation record stores reference to the newly created sales order

edgeCases.description: Attempt to convert a quotation whose validUntil has passed
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Validation fails with CONVERT_PRECONDITION_FAILED indicating expiry

edgeCases.description: Attempt to convert a quotation that was already converted to an order
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Validation fails indicating the quotation has already been converted

edgeCases.description: Attempt to convert a draft quotation (status DR)
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Validation fails - only completed quotations can be converted

processes.name: voidQuotation
preconditions: Quotation must not have been converted to an order

steps.name: validateVoidPreconditions
steps.description: Verify the quotation is completed and not yet converted

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Reject void if quotation is not completed or has been converted to an order

edgeCases.description: Attempt to void a draft quotation (status DR)
Attempt to void a quotation that was already converted to an order
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Validation fails - converted quotations cannot be voided

edgeCases.description: Attempt to void an already voided quotation
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Validation fails - cannot void an already voided quotation
